summary: Completed Sprint 1 MVP testing for Nagarik Mobile PWA. 14/14 backend API tests passed (100%). 7/8 mobile screens working correctly. Mobile Home has INTERMITTENT loading issue - sometimes stuck on spinner while API works correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: INTERMITTENT: Home screen sometimes stuck on loading spinner while FloatingSafetyIndicator (using same API) works. Appears to be race condition or timing issue.
ui_bugs.details: API /api/safety-events/user-dashboard returns 200 with correct data. Issue is intermittent - sometimes loads, sometimes doesn't.

issues: No floating safety indicator visible (hidden on purpose per design but inconsistent with other screens)

backend_api_tests.TestMobileUserDashboard::test_user_dashb: PASS - risk_score, risk_level, session_active, guardian_count, emergency_contact_count all present
backend_api_tests.TestMobileFakeCall::test_fake_call_prese: PASS - Mom, Dad, Boss, Partner, Friend all work
backend_api_tests.TestTravelModes::test_all_travel_modes: PASS - walking, driving, transit all work

ui_tests.Tab Bar: PASS - Home, Map, SOS (center red), Alerts, Profile all present
ui_tests.FloatingSafetyIndicator: PASS - shows risk score at top of screens
ui_tests.MobileHome: INTERMITTENT FAIL - sometimes stuck on loading
ui_tests.MobileSOS: PASS - SOS button and press-and-hold UI working
ui_tests.MobileFakeCall: PASS - 5 presets, delay slider, trigger button all working
ui_tests.MobileSession: PASS - destination input, lat/lng fields, travel modes, start button working
ui_tests.MobileLive: PASS - redirects correctly when session active
ui_tests.MobileSafeRoute: PASS - coordinate inputs, Use My Location, Analyze Route button working
ui_tests.MobileAlerts: PASS - shows alerts list with severity badges
ui_tests.MobileProfile: PASS - user card, guardians, emergency contacts, settings, logout all working

verified_screens: /m/session - Start session with destination and travel mode
action_items: INVESTIGATE: MobileHome intermittent loading issue - home screen sometimes stuck on spinner. API works (verified via curl and direct fetch), but React component sometimes doesn't update state correctly. Consider adding timeout/retry logic or error state handling.
OPTIONAL: Add error state to MobileHome when API fails to help diagnose issues
critical_code_review_comments: MobileHome silent catch at line 25 doesn't show error state to users - consider adding error handling UI
FloatingSafetyIndicator uses same API endpoint and works consistently - compare implementation patterns
All 8 mobile screens have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Tab bar correctly hides on /m/live and /m/fake-call as per hideTabBar logic
Session screen correctly redirects to /m/live when session is already active
seed_data_creation: Test session started/ended during API tests (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 1 Mobile PWA MVP tested. 8 screens under /m/* routes. Backend API 100% working. MobileHome has intermittent loading issue - the FloatingSafetyIndicator (which uses the same /safety-events/user-dashboard API) works, but MobileHome sometimes gets stuck on loading spinner. All other screens (SOS, Fake Call, Session, Live, Safe Route, Alerts, Profile) work correctly. Tab bar has 5 tabs with SOS as center red button. Use mobile viewport 430x932 for testing.
